title: Supermajor Warns Oil Prices Could Hit $160 Within Weeks
summary: Just about two months ago, JPMorgan did the math on "How Long Before The World Hits Crude Oil Operational Minimum." title: Japan Crude Imports Fell 66% in April
summary: Amid the supply disruption in the Middle East, Japan’s crude oil imports crashed by 66% in April from the same month last year, official Japanese data showed on Friday. Japan imported 4.07 million kilolitres, or about 850,000 barrels per day (bpd), of crude oil last month, down by 65.7% from the Ap…

title: Two Risky Small Cap Energy Stocks to Buy and Hold
summary: Energy is usually seen as quite a conservative sector for investors. title: Norway Lobbies to Persuade EU to Drop Arctic Drilling Ban
summary: Norway, Western Europe's top oil and gas producer, has intensified lobbying at the European Union to persuade the bloc to remove or tweak its moratorium on Arctic oil and gas drilling.
